# PHIL.153 ? Bet on Strengths

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** resource_allocation
**Subcategory:** bet_on_strengths
**Domain:** RESOURCE_ALLOCATION
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Double down on what works rather than fixing weaknesses

## Application
Identify core strengths, invest heavily there, partner or outsource weaknesses
